title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 003
task1_desc: Create a script to generate 5-smooth numbers, whose prime divisors are less or equal to 5. They are also called Hamming/Regular/Ugly numbers. For more information, please check this [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regular_number).
task1_body: Create a script to generate 5-smooth numbers, whose prime divisors are less or equal to 5. They are also called Hamming/Regular/Ugly numbers. For more information, please check this [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regular_number).
task2_desc: Create a script that generates **Pascal Triangle**. Accept number of rows from the command line. The Pascal Triangle should have at least 3 rows. For more information about **Pascal Triangle**, check this [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pascal%27s_triangle) page.
task2_body:
Create a script that generates **Pascal Triangle**. Accept number of rows from the command line. The Pascal Triangle should have at least 3 rows. For more information about **Pascal Triangle**, check this [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pascal%27s_triangle) page.

Last date to submit the solution **6 pm (UK Time) Sunday 14th April 2019**.
